title: DeXe backend REST reads: protocol stats, DAO stats, token holders, NFTs
notes: First e2e coverage of the anonymous backend read surface (no auth, zero gas). dao_stats may legitimately return 0 points for a lightly-tracked DAO and the agent wallet may hold 0 NFTs — those criteria assert shape, not magnitude. Backend requests time out at 8s; a transient timeout is re-runnable.

successCriteria.check: protocol has a positive total TVL and at most 5 top DAOs each with a name and TVL
daoStats.points >= 0 and daoStats.data is an array (no error result)
holders.count > 0 and holders are sorted by balance descending
nfts.count >= 0 and nfts.nfts is an array (agent wallet may hold none)
